/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/ar qc libruntime.a CMakeFiles/runtime.dir/Transient.c.o CMakeFiles/runtime.dir/Object.c.o CMakeFiles/runtime.dir/Integer.c.o CMakeFiles/runtime.dir/PersistentList.c.o CMakeFiles/runtime.dir/PersistentVector.c.o CMakeFiles/runtime.dir/PersistentVectorIterator.c.o CMakeFiles/runtime.dir/PersistentVectorNode.c.o CMakeFiles/runtime.dir/String.c.o CMakeFiles/runtime.dir/Double.c.o CMakeFiles/runtime.dir/Nil.c.o CMakeFiles/runtime.dir/Boolean.c.o CMakeFiles/runtime.dir/Symbol.c.o CMakeFiles/runtime.dir/Class.c.o CMakeFiles/runtime.dir/Deftype.c.o CMakeFiles/runtime.dir/ConcurrentHashMap.c.o CMakeFiles/runtime.dir/Interface.c.o CMakeFiles/runtime.dir/Keyword.c.o CMakeFiles/runtime.dir/Function.c.o CMakeFiles/runtime.dir/Var.c.o CMakeFiles/runtime.dir/BigInteger.c.o CMakeFiles/runtime.dir/Ratio.c.o CMakeFiles/runtime.dir/PersistentArrayMap.c.o
/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/ranlib libruntime.a
